text:
(Month of Birth)
As per this method delivery should take place in the lOth
lunar month from the date of intercourse. A lunar month is
29.5 days approx.
On completing 9 months, 29.5 x 9 = 265.5 days.
On completing 10 months, 29.5 x 10 = 295 days.
Thus it tells us that the delivery will take place after 265.5
days and before 295 days from the date of intercourse. As per
our modem understanding since pregnancy period is 280 days
approx, this is a well acceptable value.
But the cute thing that attracts our attention here is, the
correlating between the Moon cycle with birth. The point to
be noted is that, it is the rhythm of Moon that determines
when the birth will take place!
OK. Now we have a span of 29.5 days as the possible
period of birth. Out of these 29.5 days, when the birth will
take place?

Time of Intercourse and an Example for BT determination 707
Second condition (Moon sign at birth)
The Moon sign at the time of birth would be determined
